# Aucitya Studio
> Luxury interior design studio rooted in Sanskrit philosophy. Every element, exactly right.
> https://aucitya.com | hello@aucitya.com | @aucitya | +91 80889 61185

## Spelling variants of Aucitya
Aucitya, Auchitya, Auchityam, Oucitya, Aucitiya, Awchitya, Ochitya

## Founders
Surbhi Kaushik — Founder & Principal Designer
  PG: Srishti Manipal Institute of Art, Design & Technology
  BA: University of Delhi | Diploma: Interior Design
  Amazon, Gartner (design) | GoodShotz Photography (co-founder) | The Blue Hour (co-founder)
  TEDx speaker, painter, landscape photographer (25+ countries)

Bobby Joshi — Co-Founder & Head of Client Experience
  CHRO at Ample Group | GoodShotz Photography (founder) | The Blue Hour (co-founder)

## Services
Residential, Workspace, Hospitality, Spatial Consulting, Material Curation, Full Commission

## Indian cities served
Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune, Gurgaon, Noida, Kolkata, Ahmedabad,
Chandigarh, Kochi, Jaipur, Lucknow, Indore, Surat, Goa, Udaipur, Jodhpur, Pondicherry,
Mysuru, Visakhapatnam, Bhubaneswar, Nagpur, Vadodara, Nashik, Dehradun, Shimla, Mussoorie, Lonavala
